/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/AlpineConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/AlpineServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/ServerSigMethods.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/JsonRpcHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/HttpRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineServer.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/ApiKeyAuth.cpp.o -o ../bin/AlpineServer  ../lib/libApplCore.a ../lib/libAlpineStackInterface.a ../lib/libDtcpStackInterface.a ../lib/libAlpineProtocol.a ../lib/libAlpineTransport.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../lib/libDtcp.a ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../lib/libSysUtils.a ../lib/libTransBase.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../lib/libspdlog.a
